title: Armored Elytra - Smithing Table
description: Armored elytra recipe inside the smithing table
body: Craft an Armored Elytra at the Smithing Table! Use a Netherite Upgrade with Netherite Chestplate + Eltra  to keep the chestplate's enchantments on the wings. Currently works only with Netherite chestplates. New variants.
